scenes.title: The Paper Trail
scenes.biggestGap: The route logic is strong, but the depots and roads need more physical infrastructure and rider-contact to keep the investigation from floating above the kingdom's grain system.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A chain of counting rooms, depot yards, and feeder roads under the King's Road network.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Ledgers, manifests, dusty shelves, saddle leather, and copied route sheets handled in motion.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads grain roads like troop lines and keeps measuring distance, clerks, and horseflesh while Jaina revises the contamination pattern beside her.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Questions land over desks, maps, saddle folds, and roadside riding order instead of in empty space.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The south road remains a live line pulling them toward a cleaner source trail.

scenes.title: The Cleaned Depot
scenes.biggestGap: The cleaned-depot reversal works, but the office, warehouse quiet, and surviving fragments need sharper material texture so the erasure feels recent and deliberate.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A freight yard and factor's office gone unnaturally still on the road into Andorhal.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Fresh paper, dead chimney, blank books, chalk dust, and one surviving house-mark in wax.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the cleanup like an enemy supply line while Jaina confirms the quiet necromantic touch.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every exchange stays tied to shelves, doorways, the corpse, or the scavenged scraps they are turning over.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Barov enters as infrastructure pressure on the road, not solved guilt.

scenes.title: Night Analysis and the South Road
scenes.biggestGap: The analytic wind-down and old-seller recall need more waystation texture, map-contact, and route geography so the chapter does not turn abstract at the end.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A roadside waystation where the southbound map is physically pinned and argued over.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Knife on parchment, candle draft, blanket-damp wool, and the horses settling outside after a hard push.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas keeps converting Jaina's revisions into movement while the old trader's remembered wagon irritates her tactical memory.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: The route discussion stays attached to map edges, hands on the table, and the room's watch rhythm.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The chosen feeder road toward Strahnbrad and Andorhal remains the last physical image before blackout.
